references.key: good annotation the box tightly covers the element with small margins
references.raw: LOCALIZATION / ALIGNMENT (0-100) Evaluate how well each bounding box fits its intended UI element. Good annotation: The box tightly covers the element, with small margins. It does not cut off major parts of the element.
references.title: Good annotation: The box tightly covers the element, with small margins
